chunks.title: Solomon's Early Reign and Sacrifice at Gibeon
chunks.reason: Describes Solomon's political marriage, the state of worship on high places, and his journey to Gibeon for sacrifice.

chunks.title: Solomon's Dream and Request for Wisdom
chunks.reason: Narrates Yahweh appearing to Solomon in a dream, the dialogue regarding his request, God's response granting wisdom and riches, and Solomon's return.

chunks.title: The Judgment of the Two Harlots
chunks.reason: Details the dispute between two women over a living child, Solomon's clever test with a sword, and the resulting judgment that established his reputation.
